tasks.title: Registrar code web read/client contract test hardening (verify/redeem)
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: strengthen web typed client/contract tests around registrar code verify/redeem scaffolding (`POST /registrar/code/verify`, `POST /registrar/code/redeem`) without adding user actions. Keep issue endpoint unresolved per spec. Update changelog + dated handoff.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-client.test.ts registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
